access_token.description: SurveyMonkey OAuth access token, sent as a Bearer token. Never logged.

base_url.description: SurveyMonkey API host root. REST streams use /v3 paths and SCIM streams use /scim/v2 paths.

user_id.description: SurveyMonkey user ID for user-scoped streams.

group_id.description: SurveyMonkey group ID for group-scoped streams.

action_type.description: SurveyMonkey group activity action type for action-scoped activity streams.

member_id.description: SurveyMonkey group/workgroup member ID for member detail streams.

workgroup_id.description: SurveyMonkey workgroup ID for workgroup-scoped streams.

share_id.description: SurveyMonkey workgroup share ID for share detail streams.

survey_id.description: SurveyMonkey survey ID for survey-scoped streams.

page_id.description: SurveyMonkey survey page ID for page/question streams.

question_id.description: SurveyMonkey survey question ID for question detail, benchmark, rollup, and trend streams.

language_code.description: SurveyMonkey survey language code for translation streams.

contact_list_id.description: SurveyMonkey contact list ID for contact-list scoped streams.

contact_id.description: SurveyMonkey contact ID for contact detail streams.

contact_field_id.description: SurveyMonkey contact field ID for contact-field detail streams.

collector_id.description: SurveyMonkey collector ID for collector-scoped streams.

message_id.description: SurveyMonkey collector message ID for message-scoped streams.

recipient_id.description: SurveyMonkey collector recipient ID for recipient detail streams.

response_id.description: SurveyMonkey response ID for response detail streams.

webhook_id.description: SurveyMonkey webhook ID for webhook detail streams.

benchmark_bundle_id.description: SurveyMonkey benchmark bundle ID for benchmark detail and analysis streams.

organization_id.description: SurveyMonkey organization ID for organization detail streams.

error_id.description: SurveyMonkey error ID for error detail streams.

scim_user_id.description: SurveyMonkey SCIM User ID for SCIM user detail streams.

scim_schema_id.description: SurveyMonkey SCIM Schema ID for SCIM schema detail streams.

scim_resource_type_id.description: SurveyMonkey SCIM ResourceType ID for SCIM resource-type detail streams.
